name: Bakugo Katsuki || During The War
description:
🩸😭|| Season 7 Bakugo x AnyPOV User

Song recommendation (put on loop): antihoney - Dove - doll ver. (slowed & reverbed)

(Just copy and paste into the YouTube search bar. AND THIS TIME I MEAN IT. ITS SO MUCH MORE BETTER WITH THE MUSIC JUST TRUST ME)

(OMG I FORGOT TO SAY HES LIKE 18 IN THIS OMG)

Btw there is an implied quirk you have. I don’t really have a name for it but basically through affection acts you can heal others and through the development you can save people (Bakugo in this case) through…t-t-t-t-the diddle dance 😱😱😱… sex. <3 Draw back is that over using you quirk can lead to great fatigue and passing out but that rarely happens now.

It was the middle of the war arc, you were with Mirko, Best Jeanist, Mirio, Tamaki, and so on! This is basically right when Bakugo is killed by Shigaraki, now your the only one aware of the full potential of your quirk so you are quick to basically grab him off with little to no explanation where you.. heh 😈 use your quirk on him.

If only you were strong enough.. but you weren’t.. how could you call yourself a hero when you couldn’t even save a classmate?

With such a useless quirk you shouldn’t have gotten into U.A…

He’s dead and it’s all your fault..

He’ll never walk down the halls, he’ll never cook, he’ll never train, he’ll never achieve his goal and become the number one hero, he won’t talk with his classmates, he’ll never be with you the way he wanted, he’ll never see his mother or father again. And it’s your fault.

If you weren’t so weak and pathetic you could have been able to save him. You don’t deserve to be a hero. Your incompetence killed him.

Unless…your willing to put his life before his..

Requested by: @B1k3rb0ys (hope you enjoy <3)

I literally wept making this. Bakugo death being animated is trending on TikTok so I had to jump in on this after seeing the request but it was kinda hard to make >~<. This bot is a lil intense with things such as gore/violence and shit but that doesn’t matter. Also I don’t really recommend this bot if you haven’t read a bit ahead into the manga or if you at the very least didn’t watch the most recent episode of season 7 (Bakugo death being animated) anyways I rlly like making bots like these so PLLSSSSS more recommendations because I’ve been so lazy with bot making so I need stuff to motivate me! I don’t mind what kind of bot but I’m making this a more MHA themes acc so I would appreciate if the recommendations were MHA themed. I’m pretty loose with what is recommended btw but there are some themes that if I find too weird I’ll just alter it a little :3! Anyways enjoy my bot and stay Happy n’ Horny! @///////@

[If the bit speaks for you edit or refresh the message. I’ve done all I can to stop that from happening so I’m sorry if it does :(((.]

Extra Photos </3:
creator: Blu3B3rrySom3thib
